name: @harness/rbac
description: ISSUE-018 — the C1 authorization core (RBAC). The six seeded roles + runtime role CRUD, the data-driven permission matrix (role × PERM-node grant rows), and the single can(user, node, context) harness gate (default-deny, two-level, no back-door) that every gated action routes through. can() resolves effective nodes from the SAME live tables the ISSUE-009 RLS helpers read (AF-080 non-drift). PERMISSION_NODES.md is homed here as the build-time catalog; the design-doc L509-615 thirteen-category matrix is the seed. Port + in-memory fake reference model; supabase-store.ts is the live pg adapter authored to the DDL; migration 0006_rbac_seed.sql is the idempotent role/matrix seed generated + verified from this catalog.
